title: 11 Big Companies' Profit Will Boom In 2023, Analysts Say
text: Worried about S&P 500 companies' profit dying up next year? Don't be. You just need to know where the money's going.

title: 5 Stock Picks For Last Week From Benzinga's Most Accurate Analysts - Marsh & McLennan (NYSE:MMC), Laredo Petroleum (NYSE:LPI)
text: Wall Street analysts make new stock picks on a daily basis. Unfortunately for investors, not all analysts have particularly impressive track records at predicting market movements.

title: These Were the 5 Best and Worst Performing Energy Stocks in November 2022
text: Unlike most other sectors, the energy sector has performed well this year. Russia's invasion of Ukraine pushed up oil and gas prices initially.
